title: 10'' Taper Candles, Set of 4 Gradient Red Candles Pink Candles Tapered Candles, Unscented Dripless Long Tall Dinner Candle Sticks for Table Dinner Wedding Christmas Home Decor
features: Vibrant Gradient Colours: Transform any space with our exquisite set of 4 gradient taper candles, elegantly shifting from rich, deep tones to soft, luminous shades. Each candle showcases a flawlessly smooth colour transition, creating a captivating visual effect that enhances your decor with warmth and style. Perfect for both intimate dinners and lavish celebrations, these candles are sure to enchant your guests and leave a memorable impression.

Tall and Slender Design: Standing at 9.85 inches in height with a diameter of 0.87 inches, these elegant taper candles are compatible with most standard candle holders. Their refined silhouette makes them perfect for creating a striking centrepiece or enhancing the ambience of any special occasion.

Long-lasting Burn Time: Enjoy the warm glow of our taper candles for extended periods. With a burn time of 5 to 8 hours, they provide enduring and enchanting illumination, ensuring your space remains beautifully lit throughout any special occasion. Indulge in the gentle flicker of the flame and create a cosy atmosphere that invites relaxation and tranquillity.

Smokeless, Dripless, and Unscented: Crafted with a premium blend of soy wax, beeswax, and other natural vegetable waxes, these candles deliver a consistently clean and smoke-free burn. Enjoy a worry-free experience with no messy wax drips—designed to maintain elegance and ease throughout their use.

Exquisite Gift Option: Our taper candles come in elegant packaging, making them a thoughtful and luxurious present. Perfect for housewarmings, birthdays, Valentine’s Day, Hanukkah, Christmas, Halloween, or any other special occasion—these candles are sure to leave a lasting impression.
